$comment: scripts/ChampionsRoom.asm — talking still starts the final battle, for a save resumed inside the room. Fully authored (wave C): the rival turns, MEET_RIVAL, the speech, OPP_RIVAL3 keyed by the RIVAL's starter (squirtle 1 / bulbasaur 2 / charmander 3), and on the win BEAT_CHAMPION -> RivalDefeatedText + the overworld lament (two texts, gh #179) -> Oak's arrival (ShowObject, UP ×5, the three-way congrats naming the PLAYER's starter, the scolding, come-with-me, his exit UP ×2 + HideObject) -> the player follows around the rival (the reversed WalkToHallOfFame RLE: LEFT then UP ×3 onto the door, gh #182) -> the native hall_of_fame ceremony (the machine, credits, the League reset — ADR-019 §1). A loss just returns.

commands.text:
{rival}: Hey! I was looking
forward to seeing
you, {player}! My rival should
be strong to keep
me sharp! And now! I'm the POKéMON
LEAGUE champion! Do you know what
that means?

then.text:
NO!
That can't be!
You beat my best! After all that
work to become
LEAGUE champ? My reign is over
already?
It's not fair!

Why?
Why did I lose? I never made any
mistakes raising
my POKéMON... Darn it! You're
the new POKéMON
LEAGUE champion! Although I don't
like to admit it.

OAK: So, you won!
Congratulations!
You're the new
POKéMON LEAGUE
champion! You've grown up so
much since you
first left with
BULBASAUR! {player}, you have
come of age!

OAK: So, you won!
Congratulations!
You're the new
POKéMON LEAGUE
champion! You've grown up so
much since you
first left with
CHARMANDER! {player}, you have
come of age!

else.text:
OAK: So, you won!
Congratulations!
You're the new
POKéMON LEAGUE
champion! You've grown up so
much since you
first left with
SQUIRTLE! {player}, you have
come of age!

then.text:
OAK: {rival}! I'm
disappointed! I came when I
heard you beat
the ELITE FOUR! But, when I got
here, you had
already lost! {rival}! Do you
understand why
you lost? You have forgotten
to treat your
POKéMON with
trust and love! Without them, you
will never become
a champ again!

OAK: {player}! You understand
that your victory
was not just your
own doing! The bond you share
with your POKéMON
is marvelous! {player}!
Come with me!
